creator: kaho@elam.kais.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Created attachment 177103
2nd patch for igb

comment #21
Thank you for your comment.

I deleted #if 0 and generated 2nd patch. WOL capabilities is always set,
but capenable depends on the contents of eeprom.

--
If try this patch, don't forget to check WOL is enabled.
When any WOL options are not enabled, please execute `ifconfig igb0 wol_magic`
before shutdown your machine.
